comment: 背包详情页动作按钮专用图标(backpack-thumb-polish P6)。老板反馈原 ic_pin/ic_no 都红、辨识度低。生成3个不同色的专用图标,纸艺贴纸风(ICON_STYLE_SUFFIX 自动追加)。不覆盖 ic_no/ic_pin/ic_sparkle(它们别处复用)。

assets.prompt: a cute rounded teal-blue trash bin with an open lid and a small crumpled paper dropping into it, waste basket
a friendly cartoon hand gently setting a small yellow cube block down onto a green grassy tile, downward placing gesture
a happy round pink paper-doll character with a colorful star sticker stuck on its tummy, arms raised
